creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
Wine-bundled wordpad application crashes whne being started. This started to occur after 0.9.45 update and looks strange due to the fact its improvements are listed in this version changelog. I don't know yet if it's FreeBSD specific

How-To-Repeat: $ wine /usr/local/lib/wine/wordpad.exe.so
fixme:richedit:RichEditWndProc_common EM_SETTARGETDEVICE: stub
wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 0x00000000 at address 0x7e359828 (thread 0009), starting debugger...
couldn't load main module (2)
